title: codereview pass 2: Rust Announce struct missing current_channel field after wire update
description: rust/lichen-core/src/announce.rs:90 - struct Announce and AnnounceBuilder must include current_channel: u8 to match updated from_bytes/to_bytes and Python. P0 correctness for CCP-9 rendezvous. Will cause compile error or mismatch. codereview
close_reason: Fixed missing current_channel: u8 in Announce and AnnounceBuilder (rust/lichen-core/src/announce.rs:83), updated FIXED_LENGTH=94, from_bytes/parse at offset 93/94, signed_data_len+write_signed_data (includes byte after seq_num), builder write_to, all test cases, scheduler.rs signed_data+builder (channel=0), node announce.rs test helpers. 3 clean codereview passes with all findings filed+fixed as codereview beads (v84n,w8sy,jwsl,j8bl). Matches Python messages.py and ccp9.json vectors. Verified via cargo test where possible.
